verdict: An exceptionally well-timed and structurally accurate chart that is unfortunately marred by unplayable three-panel hold configurations for a standard single-pad layout.

issues.problem: Three-panel hold (U, D, L are all held simultaneously from 47.166 to 47.667). This is physically unplayable using feet alone without brackets and should be avoided on standard single charts.
Three-panel hold overlap (U, L, D are held simultaneously until 57.046), creating an awkward physical constraint.
Duplicate jump event listed twice on the exact same timestamp, indicating a minor charting/exporting data error.
A jump (D + U) is incorrectly formatted as two individual tap events on the same timestamp instead of a unified JUMP instruction.
Three-panel hold (D, L, R are all held simultaneously until 101.441), forcing an unexpected 'hand' note requirement.
Another illegal three-panel hold combination (L, D, U are all held simultaneously until 111.746).
